testcase.name: Response has service name and version

testsuite.name: 01_Functional / POST valid temperature reading returns 201
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0
--- testScriptError: Unexpected token 'I' at 1:1 Internal Server Error ^ ---

testcase.name: Status code is 201

failure.message: expected response to have status code 201 but got 500

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: c306d369-ccbd-4eb8-ad7d-bf5fd50a3709. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab04 IoT Docker Verification. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 201 but got 500 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:2).
